parties.name: KANG, YAN 366 12TH AVE SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94118

calendar.matters:
NAME CHANGE CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jul-02-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of two Minors.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings Not Reported.

Petitioner Yan Kang was present in pro per on behalf of the Minors, Zhenchun Lu and Zhentao Lu, who were both present for this morning's proceedings.
Both of the minors' parents, Yan Kan and Feng Lu, signed the petition for change of name.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of names were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors from Zhenchun Lu to Justin Lu, and Zhentao Lu to Jason Lu.

Decrees Changing Names were submitted to and signed by the Court.
